classified_questions.question: Can you describe what a combination is? How is it different from a permutation?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How many ways are there to choose a group of 3 items from a set of 6 items? Can you explain why?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you generalize the formula for computing combinations, using the example of $\dbinom{6}{3}$?
classified_questions.label: e

classified_questions.question: How would the value of $\dbinom{6}{3}$ change if we wanted to choose a larger or smaller group of items from the set of 6? Can you explain why?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: In what types of problems or real-life scenarios might we use combinations? Can you give examples?
classified_questions.label: e
